vocabulary.name: AG-UI
notes: AG-UI is an edge protocol projection; ledger facts and runtime events remain agentOS-owned truth.

vocabulary.name: Effect Schema
notes: Effect Schema is the schema source; AgentSchema derives provider-specific projections and fingerprints.

vocabulary.name: Effect AI
notes: Effect AI is provider transport, not ledger truth or admission evidence ownership.

vocabulary.name: Cloudflare Durable Object
notes: The Durable Object adapter owns storage and transaction shape while preserving the backend protocol contract.
